description: A perfect addition to your ethnic wardrobe, this embellished slipper from catwalk is crafted from high quality material to offer exemplary comfort without compromising on style. Heel: 2.5" Upper Heavily embellished synthetic leather straps in a thong style with a toe separator Mildly padded velvetty footbed with a silk patch along the length of the footbed Outsole TPU outsole with herringbone grooves on the forefoot and horizontal grooves on the heel for absolute grip Raised heel for ergonomic comfort Slipper care Wipe surface with a clean and dry cloth Do not use a drier or store in direct sunlight
